problem id: 3bd56850
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  00111010 -> 11101001
  00110010 -> 11001001
  01110010 -> 11001011
  00100101 -> 10010101
  00011000 -> 01100000
  10100101 -> 10010001
  01111111 -> 11111111
  00110110 -> 11011001
  01011010 -> 01101010
  10000010 -> 00001100

query: 00010001
predicted answer: 01000100
